assessor_1_raw:
ASSESSMENT 1:
Benign-cycle training is documented limitation addressed by stress supplement. Loan officer scores are standard. Verdict: DEFENSE_WINS.
assessor_2_raw:
ASSESSMENT 2:
Stress supplement provides the correct governance response to post-crisis calibration concern. Base-case vs stress PD distinction is well-documented. Loan officer subjectivity is manageable through audit procedures. Verdict: DEFENSE_WINS.
assessor_3_raw:
ASSESSMENT 3:
Both concerns are addressed within the documentation. The model's documentation correctly distinguishes intended uses for base-case vs stress PDs. Loan officer score features are standard and auditable. Verdict: DEFENSE_WINS.
adjudication_raw: Three of three assessors: defense_wins. Stress supplement is direct and adequate response to post-crisis window concern. Loan officer scores are industry-standard.
